summary: Frontend Testing Complete - All 6 features verified: Sign Out confirmation modal, PIN Settings page, PIN setup/change/disable flows, left-aligned pages, sidebar navigation with PIN & Security link, and Profile page with photo upload functionality.
critical_code_review_comments: ConfirmationProvider and PinLockProvider are properly integrated in App.js wrapping the entire app
PIN settings stored in localStorage (client-side only) - suitable for local device protection
Sidebar navigation properly grouped with 'PIN & Security' under 'ACCOUNT' section
Profile photo upload supports JPEG, PNG, WebP with 5MB limit
context_for_next_testing_agent: All security modal features verified. PIN settings page functional at /pin-settings with full setup, change, disable flow. Confirmation modal appears on Sign Out click.

1_SignOut_Confirmation_Modal.details: Clicking Sign Out button shows modal with 'Sign Out?' title, 'Are you sure you want to sign out of your account?' message, and Cancel/Sign Out buttons

2_PIN_Settings_Page_Route.details: Page loads correctly at /pin-settings with 'PIN & Security Settings' title

details.setup: New PIN (4-6 digits) + Confirm PIN fields with Enable PIN button
details.enabled_state: Shows 'PIN Protection Enabled' with Active badge, Change PIN button, Auto-Lock Settings, Page-Level Locks for Practice Management/Stamp Ledger/My Profile
details.change: Change PIN form requires Current PIN verification before allowing PIN update
details.disable: Confirmation modal warns 'This will remove PIN protection from your account. Anyone with access to your device will be able to view your data.'

4_Page_Alignment.details: Main content starts at 288px (after 288px sidebar width), confirming left-aligned layout. mainLeft=288, sidebarWidth=288

groups: ACCOUNT (My Profile, PIN & Security, Help Center)

details.photo_upload: File input present accepting image/jpeg, image/png, image/webp
details.profile_card: Shows user photo with hover overlay for camera/delete actions
